source_name: USDA National Agricultural Statistics Service Quick Stats API

WHEAT_CONDITION.interpretation: USDA/NASS crop condition records did not include a usable good/excellent percentage.

WHEAT_PRODUCTION.interpretation: Production fell sharply year over year; smaller supply usually supports crop prices.

WHEAT_PROGRESS.interpretation: Crop progress is context until compared with normal pace. Delays can support prices through supply risk; smooth progress can pressure prices through better supply confidence.

CORN_CONDITION.interpretation: USDA/NASS crop condition records did not include a usable good/excellent percentage.

CORN_PRODUCTION.interpretation: Production rose sharply year over year; larger supply usually pressures crop prices.

CORN_PROGRESS.interpretation: Crop progress is context until compared with normal pace. Delays can support prices through supply risk; smooth progress can pressure prices through better supply confidence.

SOY_CONDITION.interpretation: USDA/NASS crop condition records did not include a usable good/excellent percentage.

SOY_PRODUCTION.interpretation: Production changed modestly year over year, so the production signal is neutral.

SOY_PROGRESS.interpretation: Crop progress is context until compared with normal pace. Delays can support prices through supply risk; smooth progress can pressure prices through better supply confidence.

COTTON_CONDITION.interpretation: USDA/NASS crop condition records did not include a usable good/excellent percentage.

COTTON_PRODUCTION.interpretation: Production fell year over year; smaller supply usually supports the crop.

COTTON_PROGRESS.interpretation: Crop progress is context until compared with normal pace. Delays can support prices through supply risk; smooth progress can pressure prices through better supply confidence.

note: USDA/NASS Quick Stats lane covers crop condition, crop progress, and production estimates. WASDE ending stocks, stock/use, and export sales remain future USDA sub-lanes.
